Event: The Celtic Adventure
Event Date: 10/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E31
Ordered Chaos Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit deals magic damage to a random enemy equal to 87% / 88% / 89% / 91% / 94% / 97% / 100% of the unit's spell power and applies decay on the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is decayed, that enemy takes 20600 / 29400 / 42000 / 60000 / 80000 / 100000 / 125000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 19% / 20% / 21% / 22% / 24% / 27% / 30% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. That enemy also takes 24700 / 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
2000 Magic damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals magic damage to 2 random enemies equal to 113% / 114% / 115% / 116% / 119% / 122% / 125% of the unit's spell power and applies decay on the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is decayed, that enemy takes 24700 / 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 24% / 25% / 26% / 27% / 29% / 32% / 35% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. That enemy also takes 28800 / 41200 / 58800 / 84000 / 112000 / 140000 / 175000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
4000 Magic damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals magic damage to 3 random enemies equal to 138% / 139% / 140% / 141% / 144% / 147% / 150% of the unit's spell power and tears through the target's armor. When the armor is torn, that unit takes pure damage equal to 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 12% / 15% of their max health and has their physical and magic armor reduced by 29% / 30% / 31% / 32% / 34% / 37% / 40% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. This enemy also takes pure damage equal to 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 14% / 17% / 20% of its max health for 3 sec.
